title: Les Aventures De Tom Sawyer
summaries: "Les Aventures De Tom Sawyer" by Mark Twain is a novel published in 1876 about a mischievous boy growing up along the Mississippi River in the 1830s-1840s. Tom Sawyer navigates childhood adventures with his friend Huckleberry Finn, from clever fence-painting schemes to first love with Becky Thatcher. When the boys witness a murder in a graveyard, they become entangled in a dangerous secret involving the villainous Injun Joe, leading to courtroom drama, treasure hunts, and a harrowing ordeal in mysterious caves.
